title: Release Notes Style Guide
body:
### Release Notes Formatting Rules

- Use Markdown headings: `#` for main title, `##` for version section, `###` for sub-sections.
- Include a brief summary after the version heading.
- List completed tasks with their IDs, title, and a one-line description.
- Use bullet points under the `## Completed Tasks` section.
- Add a `## Known Issues` section if any.
- Keep tone professional and concise.
- Do not include confidential information.
